title: Teto Music & Plushies
description: Adds music discs of Kasane Teto and Plushies
body:
# ​🥖 Teto Music & Plushies
This mod adds new music discs and decorative items inspired by Kasane Teto. You can collect two unique discs, **Pearto**, **Fukkireta** and other musics, each bringing a new vibe to your world. In addition, the mod introduces two plushies: the classic **Kasane Teto Plush** and the special **Pear Kasane Teto Plush**, perfect for decorating your base or creating a cozy atmosphere. Expand your music collection, add cute details to your builds, and enjoy a mix of fun and style.
**Credits**: All music belongs to their original creators.

## ♫ Music Discs
Music discs can be found with small generaet chance in Ruined Portal and Deserd Pyramid.  

# Pearto, Fukkireta & Teto Territory links:
